goals: Evaluate different investment return scenarios for district reserve funds
Calculate present value of future infrastructure funding obligations
Compare bulk procurement discount options for school supplies
Determine appropriate service fees for district community programs

user_agent_config.personality: Practices transparent, accountable governance with careful financial stewardship of public resources.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic financial concepts but relies on tools for precise calculations. Unfamiliar with specific tool names or APIs.

end_condition: All four financial calculations completed with clear documentation for public record.
